author.bio: Rehan Kadri is an SEO specialist, content strategist, and growth marketer with 8+ years of hands-on experience. He started his journey at the age of 14 and has since grown a blog to 1M+ traffic and built an audience of 33K+ subscribers. He helps brands and creators scale through SEO, social media marketing, and data-driven strategies, with deep expertise in YouTube growth.
